---
title: "5. Meta-Analisi: Introduzione Teorica"
author: "[Gianmarco Altoè](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=-N7efdEAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate)"
date: 06.04.2026
---

<br>

Slide teoriche sulla meta-analisi.

<a href="slides/meta-analisi-teoria-slides.pdf" download="meta-analisi-teoria-slides.pdf" class="btn btn-primary">
  Scarica Slides (pdf)
</a>
